overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The scene features wet reflective pavement, towering skyscrapers with neon advertisements, palm-lined walkways, and ends at a street food stall with vibrant purple neon lighting. This is gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway toward the large digital billboard ahead

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway
massive screen displaying a harbor scene with yachts against a purple sunset
metal railing on the right wall with warm yellow lighting
red rectangular sign with white NC logo mounted above the billboard

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered pedestrian walkway at night. Tall palm trees line the left side while a metal railing runs along the right wall. Ahead, a massive digital billboard displays a harbor scene, with a red NC logo sign visible above it. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights, and no other people are present.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza surrounded by skyscrapers

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza area with tall buildings surrounding

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the plaza as the environment opens up to reveal towering skyscrapers

entered.detail: small structure with PAWNSHOP signage and yellow-orange illuminated facade
towering buildings with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
rectangular planters with palm trees and upward lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into an open urban plaza surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers. A pawn shop with yellow-orange lighting appears on the left, while illuminated palm planters line the right side. The large digital billboard from the previous segment is now on the right as the camera moves past it.

events.description: purple neon lights from food stall become visible ahead, changing the ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward the purple neon glow of a food stall in the distance

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking toward the food stall area

entered.detail: food vendor structure with bright purple neon strip lighting along the roof edge

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the open plaza, moving past the pawn shop on the left. In the distance, a food stall with vibrant purple neon lighting becomes visible. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights from the surrounding buildings and the approaching stall.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food stall with outdoor seating

events.description: slows down as approaching the food stall tables where people are seated
arrives at the food stall, focusing on the people sitting at the round tables

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing people sitting at the food stall tables, slowing to a stop

notable_agents.action: person wearing a wide-brimmed hat sitting at a round table facing the stall
person standing near the table holding a drink and looking toward the stall

entered.detail: circular black tables with stools arranged in front of the food stall
illuminated menu display with Japanese characters hanging at the stall counter

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at the neon-lit food stall, slowing down as it approaches the outdoor seating area. Two people are visible—one seated at a round table wearing a distinctive hat, and another standing nearby holding a drink. The purple neon lighting from the stall illuminates the scene, with a menu board visible behind the counter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered pedestrian walkway into a wide, neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins under a covered path lined with palm trees and a metal railing, moving toward a massive digital harbor billboard and a red NC logo reflected in the wet pavement. As the camera exits the cover, the environment opens into a vast plaza surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers, passing a yellow-orange lit pawn shop and illuminated planters. The scene then shifts toward the distance where a vibrant purple glow emerges from a street food stall, with the colorful reflections on the ground guiding the way. Finally, the camera slows as it arrives at the stall's outdoor seating area, revealing a menu board and two people gathered under the intense purple neon light.
